# Pull Request — BM Planning Site

## Summary

What changed on this page / component?

## Type

- [ ] Copy / content
- [ ] UI / layout
- [ ] SEO / meta tags
- [ ] CI / deploy
- [ ] Other

## How to verify

```bash
npm run build
npm run preview
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Links and `VITE_BASE_PATH` considered (if deploying)
- [ ] Text in English
